zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught於1200年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆時，她的父親Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath28歲，母親Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim23歲。她於1225年4月28日與Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年2月24日在愛爾蘭康瑙特享年40歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭康瑙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught于1200年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆时，她的父亲Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath28岁，母亲Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim23岁。她于1225年4月28日与Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年2月24日在爱尔兰康瑙特享年40岁，埋葬在爱尔兰康瑙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught was born in 1200, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, was 28 and her mother, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, was 23. She married Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught on 28 April 1225, in County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 24 February 1240, in Connaught, Ireland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Connaught, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught est née en 1200, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught le 28 avril 1225, à County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 février 1240, à Connaught, Irlande, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Connaught, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught 1200 in Trim, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim 23. Sie hat am 28. April 1225 in County Meath, Irland Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Februar 1240 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Connaught, Irland und wurde in Connaught, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught è nata il nel 1200 nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught il 28 aprile 1225, nel County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 febbraio 1240, nel Connaught, Irlanda, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Connaught, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaughtが1200年にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムで生まれた時，父Walter de Lacy Lord of Meathは28歳，母Margaret de Braose Lady of Trimは23歳であった。1225年4月28日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスでRichard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaughtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1240年2月24日にアイルランドコナウトで40歳で死去し，アイルランドコナウトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught(이)가 1200년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1225년 4월 28일 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 2월 24일 아일랜드 콘오트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 콘오트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught nasceu em 1200, em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught em 28 de abril de 1225, em County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1240, em Connaught, Irlanda, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Connaught, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught родилась в 1200 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught 28 апреля 1225 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 24 февраля 1240 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности коннот, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught nació en 1200, en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught el 28 de abril de 1225, en County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1240, en Connaught, Irlanda, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Connaught, Irlanda.
